summary: The diff implements all three requirements thoroughly. REQ-1 is addressed via a premium circular AP logo badge with deep green gradient background and gold ring border in Hero.tsx and Navbar.tsx. REQ-2 is addressed by explicitly setting hero text colors using inline OKLCH values (warm white/cream tones) rather than relying on theme variables. REQ-3 is addressed through consistent earthy palette usage across Navbar, Hero, DairyFeedSection, AgriInputsSection, and CoffeeTradingSection, with CTA hover states and consistent typographic hierarchy. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.
